title: Exploding Arrow
description: Adds a craftable Exploding Arrow (TNT + Arrow) that creates a localized explosion on impact with any block or entity.
body:
# 🏹 Exploding Arrows

**Turn your archery into artillery!** 🧨💥

Exploding Arrows adds a powerful new ammunition type to Minecraft. Craftable with TNT and Arrows, these projectiles pack a punch, creating a fiery explosion on impact with any block or entity. Perfect for clearing obstacles, dealing splash damage to mobs, or just having a blast!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ff10e7f8ea4633ac1a20a368920aca5128ee0c_0.webp)

## ✨ Features

*   **💥 Explosive Impact**: Arrows explode immediately upon hitting a target (Power 2.0).
*   **🏹 Seamless Integration**: Works with standard Bows and Crossbows.
*   **🧨 Crafted for Balance**: Requires TNT to craft, ensuring it's powerful but costly.
*   **🎯 Multiplayer Ready**: Fully server-side compatible logic (Client required for custom texture).

## 🛠️ Recipe

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10f4b6a568adc501c14680d4ffc069c7fc774635.png)
